ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property type */,
  "zipcode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the zip code */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the property */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates of the property */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the property record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the property record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_zipcode_id FOREIGN KEY ("zipcode_id") REFERENCES zipcodes ("zipcode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_property_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_type_id") REFERENCES property_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "froyo_shops" (
  "shop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each froyo shop */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the froyo shop */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates of the froyo shop */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the froyo shop */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the froyo shop record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the froyo shop record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the property type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the property type record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the property type record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zipcodes" (
  "zipcode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zip code */,
  "zipcode" INTEGER /* Zip code number */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the zip code is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the zip code is located */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the zip code is located */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the zip code record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the zip code record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zipcode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_froyo_relationship" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property-froyo relationship */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "shop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the froyo shop */,
  "distance_miles" REAL /* Distance between the property and the froyo shop in miles */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_froyo_relationship_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_froyo_relationship_shop_id FOREIGN KEY ("shop_id") REFERENCES froyo_shops ("shop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property value record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "value_date" TEXT /* Date of the property value */,
  "property_value" REAL /* Value of the property */,
  "valuation_method" TEXT /* Method used to value the property (e.g., appraisal, market analysis) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the property value record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the property value record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_values_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "accessed_table" TEXT /* Table accessed (e.g., properties, froyo_shops) */,
  "accessed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accessed record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property feature */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the property feature record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the property feature record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_features_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "froyo_shop_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each froyo shop feature */,
  "shop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the froyo shop */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the froyo shop feature record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the froyo shop feature record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_froyo_shop_features_shop_id FOREIGN KEY ("shop_id") REFERENCES froyo_shops ("shop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the property (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_reviews_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
